title: AgentCore Managed Harness: Getting Started
summary: Amazon Bedrock AgentCore Managed Harness simplifies agent deployment by replacing container and orchestration boilerplate with JSON configuration and system prompts. It provides isolated execution environments per session, persistent storage, cross-session memory, hot-swappable models and tools, and integrations with browsers, code interpreters, and external services like Telegram.
